prompt: Which statement best reflects professional practice in this competency area?

options.text: Apply recognized standards, document decisions, and seek proportionate solutions aligned with client objectives.
Ignore applicable codes and rely on informal practice only.
Defer all professional judgment to unqualified subcontractors without review.
Avoid record-keeping because it slows delivery.

explanation: Correct: Apply recognized standards, document decisions, and seek proportionate solutions aligned with client objectives. This aligns with Agent Registration and Qualification for this readiness check.

distractorExplanations.b: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Agent Registration and Qualification.
distractorExplanations.c: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Agent Registration and Qualification.
distractorExplanations.d: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Agent Registration and Qualification.

sourceNote: Minimal preview bank — Agent Registration and Qualification (10 questions per topic seed).
